sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Abbott Expands Board and Enhances Equity Incentive Programs
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories expanded its board to 13 members with the appointment of Kevin Conroy and secured shareholder approval for directors and auditor. Shareholders also approved a new 10-year equity incentive program and a non-U.S. employee stock plan, signaling strong support for Abbott's governance and compensation strategies. Analyst ratings on ABT stock generally indicate a Buy with a target price of $108.00, though TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it Neutral due to mixed financials.

feed.title: First Bank Announces First Quarter 2026 Net Income of $7.6 Million
feed.summary: First Bank reported a net income of $7.6 million, or $0.30 per diluted share, for the first quarter of 2026, a decrease compared to $9.4 million in Q1 2025. The bank saw modest growth in loans and deposits, with total loans reaching $3.30 billion and deposits $3.23 billion. Despite a strong net interest margin and operating efficiency, profitability was impacted by elevated credit loss expenses, primarily due to issues in its credit-scored small business portfolio.

feed.title: Public Storage Q1 earnings beat expectations, 2026 guidance remains below consensus (PSA:NYSE)
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) reported first-quarter earnings that surpassed analyst estimates. However, the company reaffirmed its full-year core Funds From Operations (FFO) guidance, which remains below the consensus estimate. Following the announcement, PSA stock was trading marginally higher after market hours on Monday.

feed.title: [Form 4] TEXAS INSTRUMENTS INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Texas Instruments director Mark A. Blinn reported insider sales of 15,000 shares of common stock through associated trusts, at prices between $276 and $279 per share. Following these transactions, Blinn directly holds 11,670 shares, while some trust positions are reduced or fully sold. The filing specifies that Blinn disclaims beneficial ownership for certain family trust positions.

feed.title: CEO of KKR Real Estate Finance (NYSE: KREF) buys 60,000 shares
feed.summary: Matthew A. Salem, CEO of KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (NYSE: KREF), purchased 60,000 shares of the company's common stock on April 24, 2026, at a weighted average price of $6.0412 per share. Following this open-market transaction, Salem directly owns 703,075 shares. This insider buying signals a positive sentiment from leadership, as noted by the "High" filing impact and "Positive" sentiment.

feed.title: [8-K] First Guaranty Bancshares, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: First Guaranty Bancshares Inc. (FGBI) announced a return to profitability in Q1 2026 with a net income of $2.7 million, reversing a prior year's loss, driven by reduced credit loss provisions and lower noninterest expenses. Despite narrowing net interest margin and a shift in asset composition, the company improved its capital ratios and successfully de-risked its balance sheet by reducing nonperforming assets. CEO Michael R. Mineer highlighted progress in strengthening earnings and advancing their business strategy.

feed.title: Ventas boosts full-year earnings guidance as occupancy gains fuel Q1 earnings beat (VTR:NYSE)
feed.summary: Ventas (VTR) raised its full-year earnings guidance after reporting better-than-expected Q1 earnings and revenue. The senior housing REIT experienced significant organic growth in its senior housing operating portfolio (SHOP) and achieved substantial occupancy gains. Following the announcement, Ventas stock rose by 1.3% in after-hours trading.

feed.title: Medtronic Data Breach Lawsuit Investigation
feed.summary: Shamis & Gentile P.A., a class action law firm, is investigating a data breach concerning Medtronic Plc. On April 24, 2026, Medtronic disclosed that an unauthorized party accessed certain corporate IT systems, with a threat actor claiming to have compromised over nine million records. Individuals affected by the breach may be entitled to compensation and can submit a claim to learn about their eligibility.

feed.title: United Rentals (NYSE: URI) SVP Gross sells 306 shares in market trade
feed.summary: Joli L. Gross, SVP and Chief Legal & Sustainability Officer at United Rentals (NYSE: URI), sold 306 shares of common stock in an open-market transaction on April 27, 2026. The shares were sold at an average price of $954.9887 each, totaling approximately $292,227. Following this transaction, she directly holds 5,737.816 shares of United Rentals common stock, indicating a routine, modest sale relative to her overall stake.

feed.title: Salesforce sought to create ‘negative record’ of employee out on FMLA leave, lawsuit claims
feed.summary: A recently filed lawsuit alleges that Salesforce violated the Americans with Disabilities Act and the Family and Medical Leave Act by firing an employee after he took FMLA leave to care for his father. The plaintiff claims Salesforce created a "negative record" during his leave and used it as a pretext for termination, despite his strong performance. This case highlights the legal risks employers face when dealing with employees on protected medical leave or those associated with individuals with disabilities.

feed.title: Franklin Electric Co., Inc. (NASDAQ:FELE) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.28
feed.summary: Franklin Electric Co., Inc. (NASDAQ:FELE) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share, payable on May 21st to shareholders of record by May 7th, marking 33 consecutive years of dividend increases. The industrial products company maintains a conservative payout ratio of 23.9%, well-covered by earnings, and analysts project future EPS will keep the payout ratio around 21.8%. Despite missing recent quarterly EPS estimates slightly, the company's revenue rose 4.4% year-over-year, and its stock traded 1.5% higher following the announcement.

feed.title: Commerce Bancshares, Inc. Announces Participation in Visa Exchange Offer
feed.summary: Commerce Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: CBSH) has announced its participation in a Visa exchange offer, tendering all 411,723 shares of its Visa Class B-2 common stock. If accepted and settled in the second quarter of 2026, the company expects to record a significant gain and may undertake strategic initiatives, including rebalancing its investment portfolio to enhance net interest income and manage interest rate risk.

feed.title: Chipotle names Fernando Machado chief brand officer By Investing.com
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill has appointed Fernando Machado as its new Chief Brand Officer, effective June 1st, to lead its global marketing strategy. Machado brings extensive experience from companies like Restaurant Brands International, Unilever, and Activision Blizzard. The company also named Arlie Sisson as Chief Digital Officer, as Chipotle aims to enhance its brand and customer engagement despite a recent dip in stock performance.

feed.title: Fossil Group chief commercial officer to resign in May
feed.summary: Fossil Group Inc. (NASDAQ: FOSL) announced that its Chief Commercial Officer, Joe Martin, will resign on May 8, 2026, to pursue other interests. CEO Franco Fogliato will immediately take over Martin's responsibilities, having previously managed the company's commercial sales organization. Fossil Group has initiated a search for Martin's successor.

feed.title: BlackRock Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) reports 6.58M Class A shares, 4.7%
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment to Schedule 13G, disclosing beneficial ownership of 6,575,818 Class A shares of Charter Communications, Inc. This represents 4.7% of the class. The filing specifies that BlackRock holds sole voting power over 5,981,883 shares and sole dispositive power over all 6,575,818 shares, as signed by Spencer Fleming on April 27, 2026.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (GABC) German American Bancorp, Inc. Posts Q1 Diluted EPS $0.88 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $0.88
feed.summary: German American Bancorp, Inc. (GABC) announced its Q1 diluted EPS at $0.88 per share, matching FactSet's estimate. The financial holding company operates through German American Bank, with about 94 banking offices across Indiana, Kentucky, and Ohio. The article also provides an overview of the company's segments, including core banking, wealth management, and insurance operations.

feed.title: JPMorganChase to Present at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference
feed.summary: Jamie Dimon, Chairman and CEO of JPMorganChase, will speak at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on Wednesday, May 27, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. (Eastern) in New York City. A live audio webcast of the event will be available on the JPMorganChase investor relations website. JPMorgan Chase & Co. is a leading financial services firm with $4.9 trillion in assets and $364 billion in stockholders’ equity as of March 31, 2026.

feed.title: [Form 4] US BANCORP DE Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: US Bancorp director Elizabeth Buse reported the acquisition of 3,355 restricted stock units (RSUs) in a Form 4 filing. These RSUs were fully vested at the time of grant and are compensation-related equity awards, not open-market purchases. They will be paid in common shares when she ceases to serve on the Board, provided her service is not terminated for cause.

feed.title: KKR, Macquarie in Italy-backed talks over telecoms network commercial deal, sources say
feed.summary: KKR and Macquarie, major investors in Italian telecom companies FiberCop and Open Fiber, are reportedly discussing a commercial deal to complete Italy's high-speed broadband rollout. These talks, backed by the Italian government, aim to resolve previous conflicts over a stalled merger between FiberCop and Open Fiber, with the current proposal focusing on FiberCop building infrastructure in "grey" areas and Open Fiber operating in subsidized remote areas, while maintaining competition in profitable regions. The initiative seeks to avoid duplicating costly investments and accelerate broadband access across Italy.

feed.title: Martin Marietta (NYSE: MLM) elevates Chris Samborski to EVP and COO
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. has appointed Christopher W. Samborski as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective May 1, 2026. Samborski, who previously led the company's West and Specialties Divisions, will receive a base salary of $775,000, significant annual and long-term incentives, and a one-time restricted stock unit grant of $5,000,000. This promotion includes robust severance and change-of-control protections, reflecting his increased responsibilities within the company.

feed.title: TSX Composite Index Boost: Bank of Montreal Dividend Signals Strength
feed.summary: A recent dividend announcement by a major Canadian bank, likely the Bank of Montreal, is signaling strong financial stability and contributing to market confidence. This action by a significant player in the financial sector reportedly influences broader equity benchmarks, specifically the TSX Composite Index. The article suggests Canadian banks are known for steady dividends due to strong regulatory frameworks and diversified revenue streams.

feed.title: Chipotle (NYSE: CMG) hires new Chief Brand Officer and first Chief Digital Officer
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) has announced the hiring of Fernando Machado as Chief Brand Officer, effective June 1, 2026, to lead global marketing and brand positioning. The company also appointed Arlie Sisson as its first Chief Digital Officer, effective May 4, 2026, to spearhead digital innovation and technology capabilities. These strategic appointments aim to support Chipotle's long-term "Recipe for Growth" strategy, focusing on brand relevance, digital advancement, and expanding its global footprint.

feed.title: PG&E Corp (NYSE: PCG) EVP receives phantom stock grant under plans
feed.summary: PG&E Corp EVP Alejandro T. Vallejo was granted 439.96 phantom stock units on April 23, 2026, tied to the company's common stock at $16.83 per unit. These units, which are paid in cash after his service ends, are part of the company’s executive retirement plans and increase his total phantom stock holdings to 33,100.04 units. The total also includes units acquired through a dividend reinvestment feature in April 2026.

feed.title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Provides Q1 2026 Results, Q2 2026 Guidance, Reaffirms Full Year Core FFO and FFO Outlook, Updates EPS Outlook
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) announced its financial results for Q1 2026, reporting EPS of $2.33, FFO per share of $2.72, and Core FFO per share of $2.83. The company also provided guidance for Q2 2026, projecting EPS between $1.23 and $1.33, reaffirmed its full-year FFO and Core FFO outlook, and updated its full-year EPS outlook to a range of $5.92 to $6.42. Key activities included the completion of one development, the start of construction on two new communities, and the sale of three wholly-owned communities totaling $340.75 million.

feed.title: Energy Transfer Announces Increase in Quarterly Cash Distribution
feed.summary: Energy Transfer LP has announced an increase in its quarterly cash distribution to $0.3375 per common unit, representing a more than 3% increase from the prior year. This distribution will be paid on May 20, 2026, to unitholders of record as of May 8, 2026. The company also plans to release its first-quarter 2026 earnings and conduct a conference call on May 5, 2026.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Inc Stock (TMUS) Closed Down by 3.65% on Apr 27: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: T-Mobile US Inc (TMUS) stock dropped by 3.65% on April 27, driven by speculation of a full merger with Deutsche Telekom, which raised concerns about regulatory uncertainty and potential shareholder dilution. Additional pressures included the upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report, recent insider selling, and network outages. Technical indicators also suggested sell and oversold conditions for TMUS shares.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (ARE) Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $671.0M, vs. FactSet Est of $684.8M
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) reported its first-quarter revenue of $671.0 million, falling short of FactSet's estimate of $684.8 million. The company also announced expectations for its full-year 2026 FFO to be in the range of $6.30 to $6.50, compared to FactSet's estimate of $6.40. This news follows a period of several analyst target price adjustments and a downgrade for the company.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 7.56% of 3M Co (NYSE: MMM) — Schedule 13G disclosure
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a passive investment of 7.56% in 3M Co (NYSE: MMM), accounting for 39,527,316 shares, via a Schedule 13G filing. The filing specifies sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 5,299,899 shares, indicating a significant but non-controlling institutional interest in 3M. This disclosure highlights Vanguard's substantial holding and confirms its passive investment strategy.

feed.title: BlackRock holds 6.7% of Farmers National Banc (NASDAQ: FMNB) — Amendment No.5
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an Amendment No. 5 to its Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a 6.7% beneficial ownership stake in Farmers National Banc Corp (NASDAQ: FMNB). This represents 3,949,423 shares, with BlackRock holding sole voting power over 3,872,170 shares and sole dispositive power over all beneficially owned shares. The filing indicates a passive investment by certain BlackRock business units, rather than an active governance campaign.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: HIPO) files 13G/A showing 1.26M shares (4.9%)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 1,261,191 shares, or 4.9% of Hippo Holdings Inc.'s common stock. This filing indicates a passive investment, attributed to certain BlackRock business units, and details their sole voting power for 1,240,081 shares and sole dispositive power for all 1,261,191 shares. The stake remains below the 5% threshold typically requiring more extensive disclosure.

feed.title: BlackRock (FTAI) reports 6.8% stake — 6,999,320 shares disclosed
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has reported a beneficial ownership of 6,999,320 shares of FTAI Aviation Ltd. common stock, which represents a 6.8% stake in the company as of March 31, 2026. The Schedule 13G filing indicates that BlackRock holds sole voting power for 6,575,380 shares and sole dispositive power for all 6,999,320 shares. This disclosure, signed on April 27, 2026, highlights BlackRock's significant, though passive, investment in FTAI Aviation.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: MMM) holds 6.6% of 3M, 34.29M shares disclosed
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment to a Schedule 13G, disclosing a 6.6% beneficial ownership in 3M Company, amounting to 34,291,537 shares as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 31,204,145 shares and sole dispositive power over all 34,291,537 shares. This update, signed on April 27, 2026, reflects BlackRock's passive investment stake in 3M.

feed.title: Director Laurie Thomsen gifts 631 Travelers (NYSE: TRV) shares
feed.summary: Travelers Companies, Inc. director Laurie J. Thomsen reported a bona fide gift of 631 shares of common stock on April 23, 2026, without any cash transaction. Following this gift, her direct holdings in Travelers common stock are 62,178.076 shares, with additional indirect holdings through an IRA and by her spouse. The filing also indicates deferred stock units acquired through a dividend reinvestment feature in the company's Deferred Compensation Plan for Non-Employee Directors.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics prices $500M debt deal ahead of June note maturity
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) has priced a public offering of $500 million in 5.000% senior notes due 2036. The net proceeds, expected on May 6, 2026, will be used for general corporate purposes, potentially including the repayment of $500 million in 3.45% senior notes maturing on June 1, 2026. This refinancing comes after the company reported strong Q1 2026 results and raised its full-year guidance.

feed.title: CHIPOTLE TAPS AWARD-WINNING FERNANDO MACHADO AS CHIEF BRAND OFFICER
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill has appointed Fernando Machado, a highly acclaimed marketing executive, as its new Chief Brand Officer. Machado, known for his work with Burger King and Unilever, will lead Chipotle's global marketing strategy, brand positioning, and customer engagement. Additionally, the company named Arlie Sisson as Chief Digital Officer to spearhead technology and innovation efforts as part of its "Recipe for Growth" strategy.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Reports 1Q26 Net Income per Share - Diluted of $2.10; and 1Q26 FFO per Share - Diluted, as Adjusted, of $1.73
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. announced its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results, reporting a diluted net income per share of $2.10 and diluted FFO per share, as adjusted, of $1.73. The company highlighted its strong balance sheet, significant liquidity, solid leasing activity for development and redevelopment space, and ongoing capital recycling strategy. Alexandria also updated its 2026 guidance, narrowing the FFO per share range and adjusting assumptions for occupancy and rental rate changes due to market conditions and potential asset dispositions.

feed.title: Ventas Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) announced strong first-quarter 2026 results, driven by its senior housing operating portfolio (SHOP), with a 9% increase in Normalized FFO per share and 15% growth in SHOP Same-Store Cash NOI. The company increased its full-year 2026 investment expectations to $3 billion due to strong market momentum and anticipates rising demand from aging Baby Boomers. Ventas also raised its full-year 2026 guidance for all key financial metrics, reflecting robust property performance and strategic investments.

feed.title: Proposed insider sales at ETN (NYSE: ETN) — 239,603; 305,234; 521,457 shares listed
feed.summary: ETN has reported proposed sales of 1,066,294 Ordinary Shares through Form 144, primarily related to employee equity compensation. The notices specify sales of 239,603 shares on February 26, 2026, 305,234 shares on February 28, 2026, and 521,457 shares on March 1, 2026. Charles Schwab & Co. is identified as the broker for these transactions, with an aggregate figure of 387,900,000 listed in the securities line of the excerpt.

feed.title: (PSA) Public Storage Expects 2026 Core FFO Per Share Range $16.35-$17.00, vs. FactSet Est of $16.88
authors: (PSA) Public Storage Expects 2026 Core FFO Per Share Range $16.35-$17.00
vs. FactSet Est of $16.88 MT Newswires
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) has provided its forecast for 2026 Core FFO (Funds From Operations) per share, expecting a range of $16.35 to $17.00. This estimate will be closely watched against the FactSet consensus estimate of $16.88. The announcement was made on April 27, 2026, and provides a key financial outlook for the self-storage REIT.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (CINF) Cincinnati Financial Corporation Posts Q1 Adjusted EPS $2.10 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $1.95
feed.summary: Cincinnati Financial Corporation (CINF) reported Q1 adjusted earnings per share of $2.10, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $1.95. This news was published on April 27, 2026, and indicates a positive performance for the insurance group, which primarily focuses on real estate and damages insurance. The company's stock information and recent analyst ratings are also provided.

feed.title: Big Tech's AI payoff hinges on revenue growth - Morgan Stanley (QQQ:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Brian Nowak advises investors to focus on revenue growth as a crucial indicator of returns on capital investments in big technology companies, especially as they prepare to report earnings. This comes amid massive investments in artificial intelligence (AI) by these firms. The article suggests that the payoff from AI for tech giants will be directly tied to their ability to translate these investments into increased revenue.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE: GL) SVP exercises options and sells 3,591 shares
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc.'s Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, Michael Shane Henrie, exercised employee stock options for 3,065 shares and subsequently sold 3,591 common shares in open-market transactions. The sales occurred at prices ranging from $154.32 to $154.89 per share. Following these transactions, Henrie directly holds 3,449.0833 common shares and indirectly holds 158.2240 shares in a 401(k) plan.

feed.title: Domino's CEO sees rivals reporting weaker Q1 sales (DPZ:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza CEO Russell Weiner anticipates that competing fast-food chains will report weaker-than-expected first-quarter sales. He attributes this anticipated downturn to factors such as adverse winter weather conditions and a decline in customer sentiment. Domino's is one of the first in its sector to report earnings, giving Weiner an early perspective on market trends.

feed.title: Gladstone Investment (NASDAQ:GAIN) Sets New 12-Month High - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Gladstone Investment (NASDAQ:GAIN) reached a new 52-week high, trading at $16.70 with significant volume, signaling strong upward momentum. The company announced a monthly dividend of $0.08, reflecting an attractive annualized yield and a manageable payout ratio. Despite missing recent quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, analysts hold a "Hold" consensus rating after several upgrades.

feed.title: Flowserve investors can watch CFO fireside chat live on May 12
feed.summary: Flowserve Corporation (NYSE: FLS) announced its participation in upcoming investor conferences. Its Investor Relations team will attend the Oppenheimer Industrial Growth Conference on May 5, while CFO Amy Schwetz will participate in a fireside chat at the BofA Securities Industrials, Transportation & Airlines Key Leaders Conference on May 12, which begins at 11:05 am ET and will be webcast live.

feed.title: Abbott (NYSE: ABT) holders back 2026 stock plan, expand board
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories announced that its shareholders approved the new 2026 Incentive Stock Program, authorizing the issuance of up to 140,000,000 common shares for equity-based awards. Additionally, Kevin Conroy was appointed to the Board of Directors, increasing its size from twelve to thirteen members. Shareholders also re-elected the full slate of directors and approved other governance matters during the annual meeting on April 24, 2026.

feed.title: Fossil Group, Inc. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Fossil Group, Inc. has announced it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Wednesday, May 13, 2026. This will be followed by a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss the results, accessible through the company's investor relations website. The call will also be archived for replay for those unable to attend the live session.

feed.title: Public Storage posts higher profit as $10.5B NSA deal heads toward Q3
feed.summary: Public Storage announced its first-quarter 2026 results, reporting a 32.8% increase in net income and 2.4% growth in Core FFO. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance and highlighted the pending $10.5 billion acquisition of National Storage Affiliates Trust, expected to close in the third quarter and contribute significantly to per-share earnings growth. Strategic initiatives include expansion projects and a data science partnership with Welltower to advance AI in capital allocation.

feed.title: Cadence enters 2026 with $8B backlog and a higher revenue target
feed.summary: Cadence (NASDAQ: CDNS) reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with revenue reaching $1.474 billion and a record backlog of $8.0 billion. Driven by accelerating AI demand and broad-based strength across businesses, the company raised its 2026 revenue outlook to approximately 17% year-over-year growth. Cadence is leading the agentic AI transformation in semiconductor and system design with the launch of its AgentStack platform.

feed.title: Crescent Capital BDC posts Q1 results May 13, webcast May 14
feed.summary: Crescent Capital BDC (CCAP) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 13, 2026, after market close. The company will then host a webcast and conference call on Thursday, May 14, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. ET to discuss these results. Historically, similar announcements have resulted in small, often slightly negative, one-day stock movements.
